HGSS.733.0000:
You have to warm up before going into
the water.\f
That’s basic.
HGSS.733.0003:
Hey, you’re young and fit!
Don’t ride your Pokémon! Swim!
HGSS.733.0006:
Are you going to Cianwood?\f
How about a quick battle first?
HGSS.733.0009:
No inflatable tube for me.
I’m hanging on to a sea Pokémon!
HGSS.733.0012:
You can’t see it from here, but there
is a big city called Cianwood\r
across the sea.
HGSS.733.0013:
I took the ship to go to Olivine for
some sightseeing. I really liked\r
the atmosphere.\f
Being a port, it was nothing like
the big cities.
HGSS.733.0014:
Do you know what lies just past
this gate?\f
It’s the Battle Frontier!\f
Every time I have a journey, I’ve
raised mostly “useful” Pokémon.\f
But now that I am here, I think I
should have brought my\r
“battle” Pokémon!
HGSS.733.0015:
Hey!
Great waves here!\f
No one can resist such
good waves!\f
HGSS.733.0016:
I see... You don’t have Surf yet...
This is just between you and me...\f
I got Surf from a man at Ecruteak,
and I think he’s still there.\f
Why don’t you try going there?\f
HGSS.733.0017:
This is just between you and me.
I got Surf from a man at Ecruteak.\r
I think he’s still there.\f
Why don’t you try going there?
HGSS.733.0018:
Hey!
Great waves here!\f
No one can resist such
good waves!
